## What

Brief description of the change.

## Why

What problem does this solve or what feature does it add?

## How

Key implementation details (if not obvious from the diff).

## Validation

For changes to scripts that affect output, run on at least one sample project and paste before/after counts:

- Project: 
- Files: 
- Segments before / after: 
- Endpoints linked before / after: 
- Specialist gaps before / after: 

## Checklist

- [ ] Pipeline runs end-to-end on at least one sample project
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated (if user-visible)
- [ ] README.md updated (if user-facing feature or specialist)
- [ ] New specialist? Added row to `agents/AGENTS.md` and README table
- [ ] New integration detector? Tested on a real project that uses it
